title: Welltower: Bear Attack And Valuation
text: Welltower has had a rough patch with the pandemic hurting profitability of its operators. The most recent big news is a new JV on its ProMedica assets.

title: Welltower (WELL) Up 2.5% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Welltower (WELL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
